code: import api from'./api';const cryptoService={async getWallet(){const response=await api.get('/crypto/wallet/');return response.data;},async createDeposit(data){const response=await api.post('/crypto/deposit/',data);return response.data;},async createWithdrawal(data){const response=await api.post('/crypto/withdraw/',data);return response.data;},async getTransactions(){const response=await api.get('/crypto/transactions/');return response.data;}};export default cryptoService;
